errors.meaning: A workpack changed a forbidden path.
Required contract, rule or projection cannot be resolved.
A mandatory rule has no machine, human or hybrid verification.
A clickable element or non-terminal node lacks a valid closure.
Equivalent information intent has inconsistent or duplicate presentation without rationale.
Natural-language layout authority is missing or replaced by structured data.
Compiler introduced new business IDs or decisions.
Implementation cannot proceed without a spec change.
